case_title: LAURENCE CABLE VS. DEAN ALAC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2008 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-19-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2009 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-13-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CABLE, LAURENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALAC, DEAN DBA ALAC DEAN CONSTRUCTION ALAC, DINA $6,585.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,710.00, DEFENDANTS DEAN ALAC AND DINA ALAC NOT PRESENT.
